chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-256 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 15-09-2025 Mr. Ghulam Shabir Jatoi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naseer Ahmed Wagan, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Through this petition the petitioner have claimed following relief:- a. To direct the respondents No.1 and 2 not to harass the petitioners at the instance and behest of private respondents No.4 to 7 as well as other relatives of petitioner No.1. b. Direct further the official respondents to provide adequate legal protection to the petitioners against the respondent No.4 to 7 and other relatives of petitioner No.1 strictly in accordance with law. The SHO police station Naseerabad is present in person and has filed his statement, wherein he has undertaken that he will provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. Private respondents including Gulzar Ahmed the father of the petitioner No.1 is present in person and submits that he has not caused any harassment to the petitioners and since last more than one year when the petitioner contracted marriage he has not contacted with them and the allegation levelled in the petition are false and fabricated. Be that as it may, it is the bounded duty of the official respondents to provide protection to the individuals without favor and fear. Since the petitioners apprehend danger to their life on account of their un-ceremonial marriage, therefore, SHO police station Naseerabad shall ensure that no harm is caused to the petitioners.

Be that as it may, it is the bounded duty of the official respondents to provide protection to the individuals without favor and fear. Since the petitioners apprehend danger to their life on account of their un-ceremonial marriage, therefore, SHO police station Naseerabad shall ensure that no harm is caused to the petitioners. The petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
